title: Syrian Feta Cheese Pilaf
description: A creamy and festive Syrian dish featuring cubed feta cheese, this lacto-vegetarian friendly pilaf is perfect for special occasions, with a smoky flavor from binchotan charcoal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the basmati rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly
Add the vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes
Add the cubed feta cheese and stir to combine
Transfer the saucepan to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes
Remove the saucepan from the oven and stir in the chopped fresh parsley
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired, and smoky flavor from binchotan charcoal
